description: Canonical Sense360 PoE room bundle SKU matrix (BUNDLE-SKU-MATRIX-001). Sellable customer-facing room kit SKUs, distinct from board SKUs (config/hardware-catalog.json) and from firmware config strings (config/firmware-combination-matrix.json, config/webflash-builds.json). This file is documentation / planning only: it does not add product YAMLs, WebFlash wrappers, firmware builds, artifacts, releases, or stable promotions. See docs/sense360-room-bundles.md.

bundles.notes: Default stable PoE bathroom bundle. The likely firmware config target Ceiling-POE-VentIQ-RoomIQ is the existing Release-One stable WebFlash build (see config/webflash-builds.json). No LED in this bundle; LED variant is gauntlet-gated.

Kitchen bundle pairs the AirIQ air-quality module (S360-210) with RoomIQ. Promoted stable-candidate -> stable-release under owner declaration HW-RELEASE-001 (docs/hw-release-001.md), superseding KITCHEN-BUNDLE-PROMOTE-001 step K2's bench-proof precondition. The three G8 evidence gates (G8-AirIQ-stack-hardware-evidence-SPS30-SGP41-SCD41-BMP390, G8-PRODUCT-POE-410-001, G8-S360-410-schematic-status-verified) were cleared by owner declaration, HW-RELEASE-001 — an owner decision, not hardware verification; the prior owner waivers HW-AIRIQ-WAIVER-2026-06 and HW-S360-410-WAIVER-2026-06 remain the recorded risk-acceptance for the stable build. The stale G1-G7 gates were cleared as already satisfied by the shipped Ceiling-POE-AirIQ-RoomIQ stable build (top-level product YAML, catalog row, full compile, WebFlash wrapper, artifact name, config/webflash-builds.json stable row v1.0.9, release notes). Kit / customer visibility is UNCHANGED by this promotion: the bundle stays hidden / not buyable in config/shop-commercial-source-of-truth.json; kit exposure remains a separate owner decision (KITCHEN-BUNDLE-PROMOTE-001 K4, WebFlash repo).

Living-room bundle is RoomIQ + LED status ring (no VentIQ). The likely firmware config target Ceiling-POE-RoomIQ-LED exists in config/firmware-combination-matrix.json with status missing-product-yaml. LED stays preview-only until the preview-to-stable gauntlet closes (S360-300-BENCH-001, WF-HW-TEST-001, WF-HW-TEST-003, RELEASE-007). Not promoted by this PR.

Bedroom bundle is the smallest RoomIQ-only PoE bundle. The compile-only skeleton products/compile-only/ceiling-poe-roomiq.yaml validates the combination today. Promotion to stable is owned by STABLE-TARGET-ROOMIQ-001 (after STABLE-TARGET-CORE-001's shared PoE-410 closure; see docs/stable-target-expansion-plan.md). Not promoted by this PR.

Landing / corridor bundle shares the included board set with S360-KIT-LIVING-P (RoomIQ + LED on Core + PoE PSU) until a future room-specific default config (for example a corridor-specific LED ring pattern or a corridor presence profile) differentiates them. Same LED preview-gating as S360-KIT-LIVING-P. Not promoted by this PR.
